text.title: QA Suite Health Metrics Canon Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-suite-health-metrics-canon methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: pick-six
step.action: Choose 6 metrics covering flake, runtime, attribution, coverage, quarantine, MTTD.

step.name: wire-ingest
step.action: Build script that computes metrics from CI history; commit weekly report.

step.name: dashboard
step.action: Build a single dashboard panel showing 6 metrics + trend arrows.

step.name: breach-automation
step.action: On breach, open ticket against route_to_methodology; notify owner.
